title: priority mux - 0 cells
body:
```
Linux x64
Yosys 0.7+371 (git sha1 4782d59a, clang 4.0.1 -fPIC -Os)
```

Simple priority mux (https://github.com/drom/icicles/blob/master/src/prio.v):

```verilog
module prio (
    input sa, sb, sc,
    input [7:0] a, b, c, d,
    output reg [7:0] ou
);

always @*
    if (sa) ou = a;
    else if (sb) ou = b;
        else if (sc) ou = c;
                else   ou = d;

endmodule
```

Synthesis script (https://github.com/drom/icicles/blob/master/src/prio.tcl):
```tcl
read_verilog prio.v
hierarchy -check -top prio
write_json prio.rtl.json
```
Output JSON file has 0 cells:

```json
...
      },
      "cells": {
      },
      "netnames": {
...
```
Expected at least 3 `$mux` cells.
Something along these line:

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/511872/33116773-da77cf60-cf1a-11e7-865e-20529303dbb8.png)
